name: okpack-incidents-feed-fetch
_note: Enabled by default but HARMLESS until you populate feeds.opml: feed-fetch runs on schedule and makes ZERO upstream calls while the feed list is empty (it logs a clean 'no feeds' no-op). Populate feeds/feeds.opml to start ingesting. The `@jitter:2h` schedule is expanded to a concrete cron with a RANDOM minute at install (framework init/pull), so installs don't synchronize once feeds are live.
prompt: okpack-incidents feed pull: fetch the incidents OPML into raw/incidents/ for the ingest lane. Pure script, wakeAgent=false.

name: okpack-incidents-vcdb-import
_note: THE seed. Pulls the open VERIS Community Database (CC BY-SA 4.0) into incidents/ — one page per validated breach/intrusion, plus an identity page per victim org. BOUNDED (newest VCDB_LIMIT default 80; 1 GitHub API call + raw CDN fetches). no_agent, ZERO LLM tokens, MERGE-safe. Set GITHUB_TOKEN to lift the API limit.
prompt: Seed security incidents from the VERIS Community Database. Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-incidents-sector-normalize
_note: Backfills two-digit NAICS sector labels on the historical incident corpus.
prompt: Normalize incident industry codes into human-readable NAICS sectors. Pure script, wakeAgent=false.
